title: Raizo Is Safe
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on raizo is safe within the Raizo Is Safe storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What do you lot think?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do I look dead?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Certainly not! I've never seen you look more lively!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Captain Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Announce experience

dialogue.speaker: Wanda
dialogue.text: Zou, claw City

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My deepest apologies

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: To you all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Allow me to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Once again confirm who I am!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That really is it!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke, Master...

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: Just like Raizo, this man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Bears the family crest...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: of the Kouzuki* family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kou... Zuki?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I never would have imagined that they'd actually know each other...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I figured he'd just get into a full-on brawl with the minks... sheesh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh well. It's not like there wasn't a good reason for them not telling us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just now, I heard them saying that neko and inu both have crests as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I guess their bonds run far deeper than we could have ever thought.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You truly are a sight for sore eyes inuarashi, nekomamushi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I am pleasantly suprised that both of you are still alive! To think that you were here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Death will not take us so easily.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We knew if that we kept those words from that day in mind and waited...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes! We knew our paths would cross once again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi! FreaksHow Catnip! You mind!? Kinemon and I have very important matters to discuss!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Eeeh!? Talking with you would give him brain cramps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm sparing him that horrible fate!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Please, both of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Exactly! So Shoo, Shoo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Our long- awaited guest has finally arrived, now is not the-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Run along now! The grown- ups are talking here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Inuarashi! Nekomamushi! Stop this bickering!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You two were such fast friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why are you at each other's throats!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I shan't allow you to squabble any more!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Even more so if the reason for your quarrel is father!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: If he saw you two behaving in such a manner, father would be deeply saddened!

summary: Raizo Is Safe: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
